# Methodology 

## Introduction

This section documents different examples of Quarto elements that can be used to structure your thesis, namely:

- Figures, see @sec-met-figures
- Tables, see @sec-lr-2 and @sec-met-tables
- Formulas, see @sec-met-formulas
- Code snippets, see @sec-met-code-snippets

## Figures {#sec-met-figures}

Refer to [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/figures.html) for more details.

### Single Figure

![This a single image, with 75% width](figures/placeholder_16x9.png){fig-align="center" width="75%" #fig-single_image}

### Multiple Figures

::: {#fig-transit_networks layout="[[54,-1,45]]" fig-pos='H'}

![This image is assigned 54% of the layout](figures/placeholder_3x4.png)

![This image is asigned 45% of the layout](figures/placeholder_3x4.png)

Multiple figure layout, with different width assigned to each and a spacing of 1% between figures
:::

## Tables {#sec-met-tables}

Refer to [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/tables.html) for more details.

### Horizontal layout

\fontsize{9}{10}\selectfont

| Region\\Mode (%)       | Walk | Bike | Bus  | Boat | Train | Metro | Car  | Other |
| ---------- | ---- | ---- | ---- | ---- | ----- | ----- | ---- | ----- |
| Lisbon city     | 21   | 1    | 15   | 0    | 2     | 10    | 48   | 3     |
| Metropolitan area | 16   | 1    | 12   | 1    | 7     | 4     | 56   | 3     |

: Example of table with an horizontal layout {#tbl-horizontal-layout}

\normalsize

### Vertical layout


\fontsize{9}{10}\selectfont

+:----------------------------------------------------+:---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Opening questions                                   | Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed vitae imperdiet felis, at eleifend quam. Praesent et odio vitae lorem venenatis pulvinar.
+-----------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Exploratory questions                               | 1.  Morbi non quam aliquet, egestas libero quis, sagittis lorem?
|                                                     |     1.  Curabitur velit lacus, tempor ut ex nec, congue pulvinar ex?
|                                                     |     2.  Sed in mi vitae erat dignissim ultrices eget ac libero?
|                                                     | 2.  Quisque a luctus magna, sit amet vulputate dui?
|                                                     | 3.  Donec sit amet quam ex?
|                                                     |     1.  Maecenas at mi mollis, scelerisque felis vel, accumsan elit?
|                                                     |     2.  Ut vel dolor ut ex tincidunt accumsan?
+-----------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Closing questions                                   | Ut in erat at quam placerat convallis. Aliquam a lectus turpis. Proin vel orci ut leo eleifend iaculis. Donec vitae ex sit amet sapien rhoncus ullamcorper. Sed at sem velit?
+-----------------------------------------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

: Example of table with a vertical layout {#tbl-vertical-layout}

\normalsize

## Formulas {#sec-met-formulas}

Refer to [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html#equations) for more details.

## In text

This is an inline formula: $E = mc^{2}$


### Section

$$
RBI(\%) = \frac{\text{95th percentile travel time} - \text{average travel time}}{\text{average travel time}}
$$ {#eq-rbi-main}

## Code snippets {#sec-met-code-snippets}

Refer to [Quarto documentation](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/markdown-basics.html#source-code) for more details.

::: {#fig-json_message}

\fontsize{9}{10}\selectfont

```{.json}
{
    "name": "John", 
    "age": 30, 
    "car": null
}
```

\normalsize

Example of a JSON message

:::
